title: toona ciliata var. latifolia
intro: Toona ciliata var. latifolia, also known as the Australian cedar or red cedar, is a plant species that belongs to the mahogany family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Toona ciliata var. latifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
